members.name: AddOutline
members.summary: Appends a [PackedVector2Array] that contains the vertices of an outline to the internal array that contains all the outlines.

members.name: AddOutlineAtIndex
members.signature: public void AddOutlineAtIndex(PackedVector2Array outline, int index)
members.summary: Adds a [PackedVector2Array] that contains the vertices of an outline to the internal array that contains all the outlines at a fixed position.

members.name: AddPolygon
members.summary: Adds a polygon using the indices of the vertices you get when calling [method get_vertices].

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Clears the internal arrays for vertices and polygon indices.

members.name: ClearOutlines
members.summary: Clears the array of the outlines, but it doesn't clear the vertices and the polygons that were created by them.

members.name: ClearPolygons
members.summary: Clears the array of polygons, but it doesn't clear the array of outlines and vertices.

members.name: GetNavigationMesh
members.summary: Returns the [NavigationMesh] resulting from this navigation polygon. This navigation mesh can be used to update the navigation mesh of a region with the [method NavigationServer3D.region_set_navigation_mesh] API directly.

members.name: GetOutline
members.summary: Returns a [PackedVector2Array] containing the vertices of an outline that was created in the editor or by script.

members.name: GetOutlineCount
members.summary: Returns the number of outlines that were created in the editor or by script.

members.name: GetParsedCollisionMaskValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member parsed_collision_mask] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetPolygon
members.summary: Returns a [PackedInt32Array] containing the indices of the vertices of a created polygon.

members.name: GetPolygonCount
members.summary: Returns the count of all polygons.

members.name: GetVertices
members.summary: Returns a [PackedVector2Array] containing all the vertices being used to create the polygons.

members.name: MakePolygonsFromOutlines
members.summary: Creates polygons from the outlines added in the editor or by script.

members.name: RemoveOutline
members.summary: Removes an outline created in the editor or by script. You have to call [method make_polygons_from_outlines] for the polygons to update.

members.name: SetOutline
members.signature: public void SetOutline(int idx, PackedVector2Array outline)
members.summary: Changes an outline created in the editor or by script. You have to call [method make_polygons_from_outlines] for the polygons to update.

members.name: SetParsedCollisionMaskValue
members.signature: public void SetParsedCollisionMaskValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member parsed_collision_mask], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetVertices
members.summary: Sets the vertices that can be then indexed to create polygons with the [method add_polygon] method.

members.name: AgentRadius
members.summary: The distance to erode/shrink the walkable surface when baking the navigation mesh. [b]Note:[/b] The radius must be equal or higher than [code]0.0[/code]. If the radius is [code]0.0[/code], it won't be possible to fix invalid outline overlaps and other precision errors during the baking process. As a result, some obstacles may be excluded incorrectly from the final navigation mesh, or may delete the navigation mesh's polygons.

members.name: BakingRect
members.summary: If the baking [Rect2] has an area the navigation mesh baking will be restricted to its enclosing area.

members.name: BakingRectOffset
members.summary: The position offset applied to the [member baking_rect] [Rect2].

members.name: BorderSize
members.summary: The size of the non-navigable border around the bake bounding area defined by the [member baking_rect] [Rect2]. In conjunction with the [member baking_rect] the border size can be used to bake tile aligned navigation meshes without the tile edges being shrunk by [member agent_radius].

members.name: CellSize
members.summary: The cell size used to rasterize the navigation mesh vertices. Must match with the cell size on the navigation map.

members.name: ParsedCollisionMask
members.summary: The physics layers to scan for static colliders. Only used when [member parsed_geometry_type] is [constant PARSED_GEOMETRY_STATIC_COLLIDERS] or [constant PARSED_GEOMETRY_BOTH].

members.name: ParsedGeometryType
members.summary: Determines which type of nodes will be parsed as geometry.

members.name: SamplePartitionType
members.summary: Partitioning algorithm for creating the navigation mesh polys.

members.name: SourceGeometryGroupName
members.summary: The group name of nodes that should be parsed for baking source geometry. Only used when [member source_geometry_mode] is [constant SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_WITH_CHILDREN] or [constant SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_EXPLICIT].

members.name: SourceGeometryMode
members.summary: The source of the geometry used when baking.

values.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParsedGeometryType] enum.

values.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_MESH_INSTANCES
values.summary: Parses mesh instances as obstruction geometry. This includes [Polygon2D], [MeshInstance2D], [MultiMeshInstance2D], and [TileMap] nodes. Meshes are only parsed when they use a 2D vertices surface format.

values.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_STATIC_COLLIDERS
values.summary: Parses [StaticBody2D] and [TileMap] colliders as obstruction geometry. The collider should be in any of the layers specified by [member parsed_collision_mask].

values.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_CONVEX_PARTITION
values.summary: Convex partitioning that results in a navigation mesh with convex polygons.

values.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SamplePartitionType] enum.

values.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_TRIANGULATE
values.summary: Triangulation partitioning that results in a navigation mesh with triangle polygons.

values.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_EXPLICIT
values.summary: Uses nodes in a group for geometry. The group is specified by [member source_geometry_group_name].

values.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_WITH_CHILDREN
values.summary: Scans nodes in a group and their child nodes recursively for geometry. The group is specified by [member source_geometry_group_name].

values.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SourceGeometryMode] enum.

values.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_ROOT_NODE_CHILDREN
values.summary: Scans the child nodes of the root node recursively for geometry.

constants.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_CONVEX_PARTITION
constants.summary: Convex partitioning that results in a navigation mesh with convex polygons.

constants.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_TRIANGULATE
constants.summary: Triangulation partitioning that results in a navigation mesh with triangle polygons.

constants.name: SAMPLE_PARTITION_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SamplePartitionType] enum.

constants.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_MESH_INSTANCES
constants.summary: Parses mesh instances as obstruction geometry. This includes [Polygon2D], [MeshInstance2D], [MultiMeshInstance2D], and [TileMap] nodes. Meshes are only parsed when they use a 2D vertices surface format.

constants.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_STATIC_COLLIDERS
constants.summary: Parses [StaticBody2D] and [TileMap] colliders as obstruction geometry. The collider should be in any of the layers specified by [member parsed_collision_mask].

constants.name: PARSED_GEOMETRY_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParsedGeometryType] enum.

constants.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_ROOT_NODE_CHILDREN
constants.summary: Scans the child nodes of the root node recursively for geometry.

constants.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_WITH_CHILDREN
constants.summary: Scans nodes in a group and their child nodes recursively for geometry. The group is specified by [member source_geometry_group_name].

constants.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_GROUPS_EXPLICIT
constants.summary: Uses nodes in a group for geometry. The group is specified by [member source_geometry_group_name].

constants.name: SOURCE_GEOMETRY_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum SourceGeometryMode] enum.
